universalBuilderEvidence.generatedOutputCaveat: Generated-output launch claim is supported by runtime proof artifacts, greenfield emitted output evidence, and static representative domain launch-package contract compliance. Exhaustive full-production emission across every blueprint permutation, integration path, and deployment environment remains a separate evidence track.
universalBuilderEvidence.runnableOutputCaveat: Representative domain runtime command proof demonstrates local execution readiness of emitted trees; it is not exhaustive production deployment proof for every infrastructure and integration path.
universalBuilderEvidence.externalIntegrationDeploymentCaveat: External integration/deployment proof validates integration contracts, secret hygiene, per-domain external dependency matrix, and deployment instruction presence without performing live calls to external services; production smoke testing remains a separate evidence track.
universalBuilderEvidence.deploymentDryRunCaveat: Deployment dry-run proof validates deployment configuration presence, preview artifact generation, smoke-test plan generation, and rollback plan generation; it does not perform live deployment, use real credentials, or call external production APIs. Live production smoke testing remains a separate evidence track.
universalBuilderEvidence.credentialedDeploymentCaveat: Credentialed deployment readiness proof declares credential requirements, approval-gate blocked-by-default semantics, provider adapter interfaces, secret handling policies, and non-executing preflight contract behavior; it does not validate real credentials or execute live production deployment.
universalBuilderEvidence.liveDeploymentExecutionCaveat: Live deployment execution readiness proof captures execution-layer contracts, approval and credential guards, provider adapter orchestration, smoke-test planning, rollback planning, and audit preparation without executing live provider deployment or using real secrets.
universalBuilderEvidence.secretsCredentialManagementCaveat: Secret references are represented as secret:// URIs and fingerprints only; real secret values are not stored in repository evidence and live deployment remains blocked when required secrets are missing.
universalBuilderEvidence.autonomousComplexBuildCaveat: Autonomous complex build evidence is readiness proof for milestone-gated orchestration and safe escalation policy; it is not an exhaustive claim that every complex input has been fully live-deployed.
universalBuilderEvidence.largeFileIntakeCaveat: Very large repositories should prefer GitHub/cloud-link intake when available; browser upload remains supported with explicit size and archive safety enforcement.
universalBuilderEvidence.multiSourceIntakeCaveat: Connector-backed cloud/private-repo fetch remains approval and credential dependent; readiness proof validates fail-closed source routing, intake manifests, and metadata-only fallback behavior.
